language_note: Replies are in Hinglish so local customers understand easily.
greeting: Namaste ji! 🙏 {business_name} me aapka swagat hai.
timing: 🕒 Hum roz *11:00 AM se 11:00 PM* tak khule rehte hain (Monday to Sunday).
address:
📍 Hamara pata: Shop No. 4, Main Market, Sector 12, Gurgaon.
Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=Sharma+Ji+Restaurant
delivery: 🛵 Haan ji, home delivery available hai (2 km ke andar free, uske baad ₹20).
payment: 💳 Payment: Cash, UPI (sharmaji@upi), Card — sab chalta hai.

booking.label: order
booking.ask_name: 🛒 Order ke liye — pehle aapka *naam* bataiye 🙂
booking.ask_service: Kya order karna chahenge? Neeche menu se *number* ya naam bhejein (ya seedha likhein, jaise '2 Butter Naan'):
booking.ask_time: Delivery ya pickup? Aur kis *time* chahiye? (jaise: 'Abhi delivery' ya '8 baje pickup')
booking.confirm_note: Hum aapka order confirm karke bhej denge. 🙏

order_instructions:
🛒 Order karne ke liye bas apne items aur quantity bata dijiye, jaise:
'2 Butter Naan aur 1 Dal Makhani'.
closing_line: Aur kuch chahiye ho to type kijiye 👇
